zh., Toddington, Bedfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾托丁頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Broughton於1484年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾托丁頓時，他的父親Robert Broughton18歲，母親Katherine de Vere25歲。他於1509年與Lady Anne Countess of Bedford Sapcote "Lady in Waiting to Queen Elizabeth I"在英國英格蘭貝德福爾托丁頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1518年1月23日在他的家鄉享年34歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾托丁頓。

zh-hans., Toddington, Bedfordshire, England: 英国英格兰貝德福爾托丁頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Broughton于1484年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾托丁頓时，他的父亲Robert Broughton18岁，母亲Katherine de Vere25岁。他于1509年与Lady Anne Countess of Bedford Sapcote "Lady in Waiting to Queen Elizabeth I"在英国英格兰貝德福爾托丁頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1518年1月23日在他的家乡享年34岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾托丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Broughton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England called Broughton. The first element is variously Old English brōc ‘brook’, burg ‘fortress’, or beorg ‘hill, mound’; the second is in all cases Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Braughton
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Broughton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Broughton was born in 1484, in Toddington, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Broughton, was 18 and his mother, Katherine de Vere, was 25. He married Lady Anne Countess of Bedford Sapcote "Lady in Waiting to Queen Elizabeth I" in 1509, in Toddington, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 23 January 1518, in his hometown, at the age of 34, and was buried in Toddington, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Broughton est né en 1484, à Toddington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Broughton, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Vere, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Countess of Bedford Sapcote "Lady in Waiting to Queen Elizabeth I" en 1509, à Toddington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 23 janvier 1518, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Toddington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Broughton 1484 in Toddington, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Broughton 18 und seine Mutter Katherine de Vere 25. Er hat 1509 in Toddington, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Anne Countess of Bedford Sapcote "Lady in Waiting to Queen Elizabeth I" geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Januar 1518 im Alter von 34 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Toddington, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Broughton è nato il nel 1484 nel Toddington, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Broughton, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Vere, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Countess of Bedford Sapcote "Lady in Waiting to Queen Elizabeth I" nel 1509, nel Toddington, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 gennaio 1518, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Toddington, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Broughtonが1484年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアトッドイントンで生まれた時，父Robert Broughtonは18歳，母Katherine de Vereは25歳であった。1509年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアトッドイントンでLady Anne Countess of Bedford Sapcote "Lady in Waiting to Queen Elizabeth I"と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1518年1月23日に故郷で34歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアトッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Broughton(이)가 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 토딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Broughton(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Vere(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 토딩턴에서 Lady Anne Countess of Bedford Sapcote "Lady in Waiting to Queen Elizabeth I"(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1518년 1월 23일 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 토딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Broughton nasceu em 1484, em Toddington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Broughton, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Vere, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Countess of Bedford Sapcote "Lady in Waiting to Queen Elizabeth I" em 1509, em Toddington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1518, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Toddington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Broughton родился в 1484 г. в местности тоддингтон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Broughton было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Vere, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Countess of Bedford Sapcote "Lady in Waiting to Queen Elizabeth I" в 1509 г. в местности тоддингтон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 23 января 1518 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности тоддингтон, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Broughton nació en 1484, en Toddington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Broughton, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Katherine de Vere, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady Anne Countess of Bedford Sapcote "Lady in Waiting to Queen Elizabeth I" en 1509, en Toddington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de enero de 1518, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Toddington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
